Virat Kohli’s Future After Coach’s Bold Reply

Dec 1, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Virat Kohli’s Future After Coach’s Bold Reply

Virat Kohli received a major vote of confidence from India’s coach following his stunning ODI century, putting any doubts about his form or role to rest.

The coach emphasized that there are “no questions about anything”, signaling strong backing for Kohli as India looks ahead in upcoming matches and tournaments.
